name: svelte-rust-clean-code
description: Clean code, architecture, and rigorous full-stack engineering guidance for Svelte and Rust projects.

interface.shortDescription: Build, review, and test cleaner Svelte and Rust systems.
interface.longDescription: Guidance for maintainable Svelte and Rust systems, from clean components and robust errors to full-stack architecture, notification flows, real-time channels, subsystem decomposition, and repeatable validation.
defaultPrompt: Design a complete notification system for Svelte and Rust.
Refactor this full-stack feature into clean subsystems.
Review this SvelteKit and Rust PR until it is production-ready.
